reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Hey can u get home by 6? Mom's coming for dinner and I'm doing pot roast

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Practice might go til 5:45, I'll head straight there. Don't worry I'll make it

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Thanks babe. Megan's got that group project so she won't be around but Tyler said he'd help me

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Good man Tyler. Tell him I'll grab ice cream on the way home for after

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Perfect. See you soon ❤️

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: You need a ride to Liv's today babe?

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Yeah! Around 5:30 if that works?

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Good with me. Should be done with drills by 5:20. School parking lot?

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Yep. Thx so much Dad ❤️

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: You got it. Have fun. Text me when you need pickup

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Hey Dad can I skip tomorrow's conditioning? Uncle Keith said he needs help at the shop.

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: What kind of help? We've got full squad drills 9-11.

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Just inventory stuff, prob be done by 1. Can I come after?

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Tell Keith we can swing by after practice. Can't skip workouts tho—we're three weeks from two-a-days.

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Got it. See you tomorrow morning then.

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: You playing Central or somebody else tomorrow night? Thought I'd come see y'all.

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Central yeah. Kickoff's 7. Defense has been sharp all week.

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Perfect. Might grab a couple fellas. Where should I park these days?

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: East lot's best if you wanna skip the madness. Get there by 6 if you can.

reply_to_message_id: Coaching, cutting, and family in Columbus, Ohio.
text: Will do. Been telling folks down at the shop about your defense all week.
